title: Add Google site verification HTML file to public directory

requirements.summary: Add static Google site verification file to frontend public directory for Search Console ownership verification
acceptanceCriteria: The file contains the standard Google site verification content format: 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49'
The file is served at the root path /google38eb840a952aed49.html when the site is deployed
Google Search Console can successfully fetch the file to complete ownership verification

file_operations.description: Create a static HTML verification file containing the text 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49.html' to enable Google Search Console to verify site ownership by accessing it at the root URL path /google38eb840a952aed49.html
